positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical botanical and celestial pattern arrangement. The main subject is delicate curling ferns, abstract lunar phases, and intertwined filigree vines, presented in an Art Nouveau style with a neo-vintage scientific illustration feel. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centralized, forming an elegant, complex border suitable for textile printing. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep teal, aged gold, and ivory. The artwork should feature strong, clean silhouettes and defined outlines, utilizing negative space effectively. Perfect for large-scale, high-contrast apparel print. Detailed etching ink drawing aesthetic.
negative: blur, poorly drawn, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, writing, gradient, photographic, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, dirty, solid color blocks
